title: Quartz Group
description: Modpack for optimization, and for a comfortable game on the server Mine In Abyss. 1.20.4 release!
body:
## Optimization
Modpack maximally optimized to give the maximum FPS in Minecraft. Were taken all the main mods that help the game run faster than usual. Made on the basis of mod [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions).

<details>
<summary>List of mods used</summary>

- Continuity
- Xaero's Minimap
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Fabrishot
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- More Culling
- ImmediatelyFast
- More Chat History
- BetterF3
- Kirin
- Cloth Config API
- Sodium
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Melody
- CraftPresence
- Exordium
- AppleSkin
- MaLiLib
- Starlight (Fabric)
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FabricSkyBoxes Interop
- Konkrete
- Dynamic FPS
- Not Enough Animations
- Entity Culling
- Memory Leak Fix
- Xaero's World Map
- Indium
- CreativeCore
- Fabric API
- 3D crops Revamped
- Sodium Extra
- Model Gap Fix
- Debugify
- Nvidium 
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)
- Falling Leaves
- FabricSkyboxes
- Iris Shaders
- Remove Reloading Screen
- Mouse Tweaks
- AmbientSounds
- Krypton
- Lithium
- Dark Loading Screen
- LazyDFU
- spark
- Acrhitectury API
- Mod Menu
- ModernFix
- CIT Resewn
- No Chat Reports 
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Eating Animation
- Language Reload
- FerriteCore
- ThreadTweak
- Zoomify
- Very Many Players (Fabric)
- FastQuit
- LambDynamicLights
- Boosted Brightness
- Litematica
- Voxy

</details>

## Visuals
Modpack contains several animation mods and recourcepacks, several retexturing and shaders: [**SEUS Renewed**](https://www.sonicether.com/seus/), [**Super Duper Vanilla**](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla) [**(LICENSE)**](https://github.com/Eldeston/Super-Duper-Vanilla/blob/master/LICENSE) by [@Eldeston](https://github.com/Eldeston) and ChocapicV9.

## Fabric Loader
On the basis of Fabric was made this modpack, because it works more stable with some mods.

## Voxy: Mine In Abyss Edition
Uses a version of the [**Voxy**](https://github.com/semyon422/voxy) mod, specially made for the Mine In Abyss server. Voxy won't work in singleplayer the same as in server.
